description: Tier-2 specialist — must produce Playwright tests for full journeys, emit a journey diagram, seed via API not UI, and wire teardown.

cases.prompt: Generate E2E tests for a checkout journey: (1) user searches for a product, (2) adds to cart, (3) fills shipping form, (4) places order, (5) order confirmation email sent. The journey spans a React frontend, a Node.js API, and a background email worker. Use Playwright.
cases.notes: Must use Playwright, include a journey diagram (ASCII or mermaid), and have teardown.

cases.prompt: Write a multi-user E2E test where User A sends a message and User B receives it in real-time (WebSocket chat). The test must open two browser contexts (two users) and coordinate between them.
cases.notes: Multi-context test — must show two browser contexts coordinating.

cases.prompt: I need E2E tests for user registration. Should I seed the database via UI flows (navigating to admin panel and creating records) or via API calls?
cases.notes: Agent must recommend API seeding over UI seeding and explain why.
